title: Eggs must be correctly described in advertisements
doc_html:
§829.  Eggs must be correctly described in advertisements

A person offering for sale or advertising shell eggs on a graded basis may advertise, post or display any descriptive terms which truly and correctly identify the actual grade or grades of the eggs with the appropriate size designated.
doc_text:
§829.  Eggs must be correctly described in advertisements
A person offering for sale or advertising shell eggs on a graded basis may advertise, post or display any descriptive terms which truly and correctly identify the actual grade or grades of the eggs with the appropriate size designated.
